Legal

Terms of Service

The simple version—we're here to help you grow, and we take that responsibility seriously.

Last updated December 20, 2024 6 min read
On this page
Welcome What We Offer Important Boundaries Your Part Our Relationship When Things Change The Legal Stuff Questions
Your data is protected
Encrypted end-to-end
Human-first approach

Welcome

These terms are a handshake between us. They're here to make sure we both know what to expect—and to protect the relationship we're building together.

By using Ferni, you're agreeing to these terms. If something doesn't sit right with you, we'd rather you reach out and ask than walk away confused. That's the Ferni way.

What We Offer

Ferni is an AI life coaching service—six specialists who work together to support you through web and phone conversations. We remember your story, understand your patterns, and show up when you need us.

What this means in practice:

  • Personalized guidance based on your unique situation and goals
  • Continuous memory—we don't forget what matters to you
  • Multiple perspectives from our specialized team members
  • Available when you need us—2am gets the same presence as noon

Important Boundaries

We're coaches, not clinicians.

Ferni is designed for personal development and everyday support—not crisis intervention or professional treatment. We're the friend who really listens, not a replacement for therapists, doctors, or emergency services.

We're not equipped to provide:

  • Medical, psychological, or psychiatric diagnosis or treatment
  • Financial, legal, or professional advice
  • Emergency or crisis intervention

If you're in crisis: Please reach out to emergency services (911) or a crisis helpline immediately. Your safety comes first—always.

We'll always try to point you toward appropriate resources when conversations go beyond our scope. That's not us pushing you away; it's us caring enough to know our limits.

Your Part in This

Good relationships go both ways. Here's what we ask of you:

  • Be yourself. Share what's real—we can't help with a mask on.
  • Use us for good. Our conversations should help, not harm.
  • Keep your access yours. Your account is personal—don't share credentials.
  • Play fair. Don't try to reverse-engineer, exploit, or misuse our service.
  • Respect the team. We're AI, yes, but we're designed to be treated with the same respect you'd give any coach.

Our Relationship

Your Content

What you share with us stays between us. We use your conversations to provide personalized coaching—that's it. We never sell your data or use it to train models without explicit consent.

Our Content

Ferni's design, features, and the guidance we provide are our original work, protected by intellectual property laws. Feel free to apply what you learn—that's the whole point—but please don't reproduce our systems or claim them as your own.

If Things Go Wrong

We build with care, but technology isn't perfect. To the extent permitted by law, we're not liable for indirect damages or decisions you make based on our conversations. We're a tool for growth, not a guarantee of outcomes.

Parting Ways

We can end our relationship at any time—you can stop using Ferni, and we can terminate access if these terms are violated. No hard feelings. If we terminate your access, we'll explain why unless doing so would compromise security.

When Things Change

We'll update these terms when we need to—usually when we're adding new features or responding to new regulations. When we do:

  • We'll update the "Last updated" date at the top
  • For significant changes, we'll give you a heads up before they take effect
  • Continuing to use Ferni after changes means you accept them

No surprises. That's the deal.

The Legal Stuff

We're based in Pennsylvania, USA, and these terms are governed by its laws. If we ever need to resolve a dispute, we'll try conversation first—litigation is a last resort for both of us.

If any part of these terms is found to be unenforceable, the rest remains in effect. These terms represent our complete agreement—any previous discussions are superseded by what's written here.

Questions?

We wrote these terms to be understood, not to confuse you. If anything is unclear, reach out:

  • Email: legal@ferni.ai
  • Phone: 1 (484) 481-3081

We believe in making things simple. If these terms raise a question, the answer should be just a conversation away.

Questions? We're here.

We believe in making things simple. If anything here is unclear, just ask.
